MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Centerstone Realty is present. Represented by Lani Jackson
Attorney, Brenda Keith, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Gabriel O'Jeda and Neftaly Villaloboes, are present.
Attorney, Alan Murphy, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Stan Bair, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
This case did NOT settle.
The trial date of MAY-24-2010 remains on calendar.
